_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Resolve conflicts in laws, regulations, policies, standards, or procedures
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting cross-jurisdictional compliance mapping, identifying conflicts-of-law and overlapping requirements, and developing harmonized compliance approaches that satisfy multiple regulatory regimes simultaneously.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. Skill RC-S-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-S-002 (RC, cosine: 0.551), RC-K-008 (RC, cosine: 0.542).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.9/10 (raw 0.590). Shared vocabulary: [conflicts]. NICE-only terms [laws, policies, procedures, regulations, resolve, standards] vs WIDAI-only terms [approaches, compliance, conducting, cross, developing, harmonized] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.855 (P=0.861, R=0.849). Balanced P/R — the 9-word NICE element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Resolve conflicts in laws, regulations, policies, standards, or procedures" and "Skill in conducting cross-jurisdictional compliance mapping, identifying conflic" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.629 ≈ STS 0.590 (gap 0.039). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [conflicts] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.7%. Shared tokens: [conflicts]. NICE-only: [laws, policies, procedures, regulations, resolve, standards]. WIDAI-only: [approaches, compliance, conducting, cross, developing, harmonized].
